text: the gold buddha in 1957 monastery in thailand was being relocated and group of monks was put in charge of moving giant clay buddha in the midst of the move one of the monks noticed crack in the buddha concerned about damaging the idol the monks decided to wait for day before continuing with their task when night came one of the monks came to check on the giant statue shined his flashlight over the entire buddha when reached the crack saw something reflected back at him the monk his curiosity aroused got hammer and chisel and began chipping away at the clay buddha knocked off piece after piece of clay the buddha got brighter and brighter after hours of work the monk looked in amazement to see standing before him huge solid gold buddha many historians believe the buddha had been covered with clay thai monks several hundred years earlier before attack the burmese army they covered the buddha to keep from being stolen in the attack all the monks were killed wasn until 1957 when the monks were moving the giant statue that the great treasure was discovered like the buddha our outer shell protects from the word our real treasure hidden within human beings unconsciously hide our inner gold under layer of clay all need to to uncover our gold to have the courage to chip away at our outer shell piece piece could you sitting on your own gold mine? did you know the average american can retire millionaire on his her current income? then why don they? simple they haven been taught that they could they are taught to use debt to get what they want now instead of having their money work for them they pay too much in taxes they are wasting money every month and don even realize in short they are financially unhealthy get financial checkup and free video on how to become financially fit for life and discover the gold within your current income get your free 3 point checkup and video now! iiu nameserver problems four of the nameservers are publishing out of date dns information the four listed below are publishing the zone from last friday they are six days behind reality 192 16 202 11 net 192 93 0 4 ns2 nic 198 133 199 102 gns1 domainregistry 198 133 199 103 gns2 domainregistry the upshot of this that correct dns resolution for dns data that has been added updated since last friday going to intermittant you lucky your resolver will query one of the five nameservers that are publishing to date zone unfortunately five out of nine aren good odds don forget you lose the gamble your resolver going to cache the bad data for to two days you user of bind 8 bind 9 you could add blackhole 192 16 202 11 192 93 0 4 198 133 199 102 198 133 199 103 to your named conf and restart bind to avoid query the bad nameservers this will prevent any queries to those servers putting 16 1 0 18 204 123 2 18 16 1 0 19 192 111 39 100 212 17 32 2 193 1 142 2 in and restarting dnscache will have the same result for dnscache users atb james irish internet users mailing list irish internet EMAIL URL

brain hurts more than dozen jokes thanks guys and girls! plus some anti french abuse from the usual suspect well brain doesn hurt much any more and was well worth now got even faster method for elliptic curve point counting both pratically and asymptotically lifts curve over field of degree in time 2 1 2 eps 2 eps with precomputation before the best methods took 3 eps without precomputation 2 1 2 eps with the precomputation done once per field not per curve and takes time 3 eps here eps arbitrarily small number hiding some logarithmic factors after lifting you compute norm in time 2 1 3 eps to get the number of points on the curve here example over 1009 bit field without precomputation using 1 ghz pentium iii ecpc4 1009 0x123 info info ecpc elliptic curve point counting made easy! info 0 0 argotech 2001 all rights reserved info info picked field polynomial 1 55 1009 info starting ecpc on 0x123 info done after 138 33 seconds info checking curve info 1 curve processed info bye! l8r rob EMAIL software development argotech URL URL

sps odrekao slobodana milosevica socijalisticka partija srbije predvodjena grupom starih socijalista celu milomirem minicem konacno odrekla politike herojskog drzanja predsednika stranke slobodana milosevica saopstenjima jedan slabo obavesten covek moze pogotovu zatvorske celije upravljati tako velikom partijom kao sto socijalisticka partija srbije zvao on slobodan milosevic socijalisti koji sebe danas kazu vise nisu idolopoklonici slobodana milosevica neprestano kontaktima clanovima simpatizerima partije pokusavaju razdvoje odbranu slobodana milosevica hagu politickog zivota srbiji pripisujuci milosevicevim braniocima nacionalnog komiteta oslobadjanje milosevica sloboda cilj uniste socijalisticku partiju srbije iako zbog istih takvih gledista svojevremeno najpolularniji socijalista posle predsednika stranke prof branislav ivkovic bio iskljucen redova sps danas rukovodstvo sps koristi jos teze grublje kvalifikacije racun njihovog predsednika pritom strahujuci bilo njih mogao biti iskljucen partije retko poslednjih dana rokovodstvu partije cuje partija nije slobodan milosevic on predstvalja partiju vec partija rukovodstvo glavni odbor stranke medjutim clanstvu medju simpatizerima stranke stvari odijaju bas planovima rukovodstva procene idu dotle septembarskim izborima ocekuje bata zivojinovic osvoji tek glasova clanovi partije najveci deo njih danas veruje svom heroju slobodanu milosevicu clanstvu partije ovih dana rukovodstvu partije oni koji predsednika stranke pogresno informisali poslednjih godina kada shvatili odzvonilo pokusavaju sacuvaju sebe eliminacijom predsednika slobodana milosevica mladi socijalisti kojih nema bas mnogo kako sps svojevremeno hvalio izgleda strani predsednika stranke tako nastupima opstinskim odborima mogu cuti uverljivi govori dejana stjepanovica igora raicevica neki milinka isakovica redova mladih socijalista clanova organizaciono politickog odbora predsednika sps obracanja ovih mladih ljudi medju clanstvom partije imaju deset puta vecu tezuni nego obracanja profesionalnih politicara koji sobom vuku teret proslosti stav rukovodstva mladih socijalista razlikuje stava saveta mladih koji takodje strani predsednika branko ruzic dejan backovic svojevremeno najveci branioci zastupnici lika dela slobodana milosevica danas pretvorili njegove najvece kriticare pokusavaju sve moguce nacine minorizuju grupu mladih koja podrzava cak poslednjih dana cuje najbolji recept rukovodstvo mladih odrzi ikao protiv sloba povezu rodbinskim vezama tako predsednik mladih socijalista beograda ana djurovic udala branka ruzica predsednika mladih socijalista srbije koji kuma uzeo dejna backovia svog potpredsednika backovic ovih dana zeni jednom mladom socijalistkinjom koja clan saveta mladih isto vreme sestra jednog clanova sps kuma uzima jos jednog mladog socijalistu saveta mladih sve svemu mladi sps drze kao italijanske mafijaske porodice 60 tih sad sta kraja price dogoditi ostaje pitanje clanstvo simpatizeri oceniti rad svog rukovodstva predsednickim izborima pimato samo sta rade ako bata prodje losije seselja koga predsednik slobodan milosevic podrzao predsednickog kandidat? powered vulnwatch foundstone labs advisory information leakage in orinoco and compaq access points foundstone labs advisory apil advisory name information leakage in orinoco and compaq access points release date august 9th 2002 application orinoco residential gateway and compaq wl310 platforms severity the ability to display modify configuration information vendors orinoco URL and compaq URL authors marshall beddoe EMAIL tony bettini EMAIL cve candidate can 2002 0812 reference URL overview information leakage vulnerability exists in orinoco and compaq oem access points disclosing the unique snmp community string result attacker can query the community string and gain the ability to change system configuration including wired equivalent privacy wep keys and domain name service dns information detailed description the compaq wl310 oem orinoco residential gateway access point both the compaq and orinoco access points use unique identification number found on the bottom of the access point for configuration through their management client this identification string used the default snmp read write community string the community strings appears to unchangable unique and not easily guessable sending specific packet to udp port 192 the access point will return information including the firmware version and the unique identification value the packet returned includes the value of system sysname 0 which in the case of the compaq wl310 and orinoco residential gateway includes the unique identification value the identification value can then used the snmp community string to view and modify the configuration the probe packet x01 x00 x00 x70 x00 x00 example probe response 01 01 00 00 60 20 38 00 00 18 19 10 8 52 69 43 20 52 47 31 31 30 30 20 orinoco 1100 30 33 39 32 61 30 00 00 0392a0 02 24 02 52 47 31 31 30 30 20 56 33 38 $ 1100 8 33 20 53 30 32 55 54 30 38 32 33 32 33 34 3 02ut0823234 32 20 56 00 2 system sysname 0 orinoco 1100 0392a0 community name 0392a0 vendor response both vendors were notified of this issue on july 8th 2002 according to orinoco the residential gateway line has been discontinued solution employ packet filtering on inbound requests to deny access to ports 192 udp and 161 udp on the access point foundscan has been updated to check for this vulnerability for more information on foundscan see the foundstone website URL disclaimer the information contained in this advisory copyright 2002 foundstone inc and believed to accurate at the time of publishing but representation of any warranty given express implied to its accuracy completeness in event shall the author foundstone liable for any direct indirect incidental special exemplary consequential damages resulting from the use misuse of this information this advisory may redistributed provided that fee assigned and that the advisory not modified in any way
